name: Waldorf Salad
recipeIngredient: 1/2 cup Miracle Whip or Real Mayo
recipeInstructions:
1. Stir boiling water into gelatin in a large bowl at least 2 minutes until completely dissolved.
2. Stir in cold water and lemon juice. Refrigerate about 1 1/2 hours or until thickened (a spoon drawn through leaves leaves a definite impression).
3. Gradually stir in mayonnaise with a wire whisk.
4. Stir in apple, celery, and walnuts.
5. Pour into a 5-cup mold. Refrigerate 4 hours or until firm.
6. Unmold. Serve on salad greens if desired. Makes 10 servings.
